description: Use this API to change the station multi-terminal converter node terminal connection in the working case. This api is defined using the converter bus number and desired node number to connect to at that end. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.5. ierr = station_mtdc_bus_term_chng(name, ibus, inode)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Quoted name of the multi-terminal dc line whose node terminal connection data is being changed. (input).

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus number of desired converter end being modified. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: inode
parameters.description: Node number to which the converter end is to be attached. node must correspond to ibus. (input).

error_codes.description: bus is not part of a substation.
node-breaker terminal connection table is full.
bus is not a converter bus of this multi-term dc line.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
